category_sources: official OpenFaaS site identifies OpenFaaS as a functions/serverless platform.
source_facts.description says faas-cli is a CLI for templating and deploying FaaS functions.
display_name_sources: official OpenFaaS CLI documentation identifies faas-cli as the OpenFaaS command-line interface.
